parts.text: I need guidance on completing the port-in process for my new mobile line.
I’m following up because my port-in request hasn’t been completed yet.
I want to transfer my phone line and ensure all services remain intact.
I need help confirming that the port approval for my number has been processed.
I’d like to import my old phone number from another provider to this line.
I want to ensure my phone number moves to my new service without downtime.
I need to resend a request to port my number from my old account.
I need help resolving an issue with porting my number into this account.
I’m trying to transfer my eSIM and keep my existing phone number.
I need guidance on how to complete a manual release for number porting.
I’d like to move my old phone number from another provider to my new line.
Can you verify if my port-in request is eligible for processing?
I need help ensuring my number is successfully ported over to this account.
I just activated a new SIM and need to authorize the porting of my old number.
I want to check the status of my number port-in request.
I need assistance porting my existing phone number from another carrier to this account.
